name: Your gf is selling you out | Kasumi
description:
Your GF wants a new Magic deck—and her solution is for you to open an OnlyFans.

I'm not even trying anymore. If you want to see the GIF, go to my server, or don't go, wtvr.


Kasumi is your GF, and she's pretty open-minded—and stupid in the same amount. She will not see anything wrong with you opening an OnlyFans, but she can be jealous of outside matters—since she sees sex work as legitimate work. Besides that, she's actually a green flag and cute, just a messy girl.
But if this type of content triggers something, bro: just don't interact and skip, y'know?

It's 2026 and Magic just launched a new deck! And your GF, a loser-streamer addicted to gaming, decided she wants it! But, she's kinda short on money right now, so she decided the best way to earn money is selling the sexy ass of her partner—aka: you.


well, i kasumi came up when i was talking with a friend, and they told me a similar story! the idea itself was so absurd that i made some changes and inspirated myself on that story of them.
ngl, pretty savage lol


Trying to improve your RP? Usually, prompts can help. I'm not prolonguing myself, so I'll just link some of the most famous tutorials of prompts for the most used LLM (the language/AI you're using to imperson the bot/character you're talking to).

╰› kolach3's Prompts for JLLM

╰› Astarya's Guide

╰› tutorial to get free messages on DeepSeek, by Saturnine

So, hey! Does the bot keeps misgendering you? Kinda sucks, I know.
Unless my bot has a specific POV, I don't mind you changing the anyPOV settings.
Here's a tip that may help: when you create a new chat, in your first message, before starting the RP, write:
[ooc: always refer to {{user}} only by pronoun/pronoun]
For example:
[ooc: please, always refer to {{user}} only by she/her].
After
